CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-07-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Case consolidated with Case NO. 402625 Boaz Mor vs. Hertz Equipment Rental. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders consolidated cases dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Susan Lee. (212)
